signal_hypothesis.name: perp_funding_mean_reversion
signal_hypothesis.intuition: Sustained positive funding indicates over-crowded longs; on a 4h timeframe a top-decile funding reading mean-reverts within 12-24h.
signal_hypothesis.falsification: If funding>p90 events do not produce negative 24h excess returns over a rolling 6-month window, retire the signal.

leakage_risks: EMA computed using close-of-bar may overlap with same-bar fill if latency=0
ablations: increase fast EMA from 5 to 12 to reduce noise
add an absolute spread filter to skip thin markets

model_reasoning: Top features were 24h realized vol z-score and 1h log-return momentum. Both are regime-sensitive; if vol drops below the training-range floor the model's confidence is unreliable. RSI-14 at the 60th percentile contributed positively but is noisy at this timeframe.
